name: Crownies
overview: Five young solicitors face the pressures and endearing madness of modern single life - in a fast paced workplace that highlights the moral dilemmas and big issues facing an apparently civilized society.

trailers.title: Crownies | Sex, Lies & Magistrates | Premieres Thursday, 14 July at 8.30pm on ABC1
